stemHtml: The arid zone lies between (1) _____ and is recognised by (2) _____. An example is (3) _____.

options.a: (1) 0–10° latitude; (2) being permanently in the ITCZ; (3) Amazon Rainforest
options.b: (1) 30–40° latitude; (2) two rainy seasons; (3) Congo Basin
options.c: (1) 20–30° latitude; (2) descending dry air of the subtropical high; (3) Sahara Desert
